name: Naruto RPG - Beta
description:
Naruto RPG - Where you can play from Konohagakure and experience the various characters from the series. (Multiple starting messages added. Adding short examples what they are and may add more later.)

Scene 1: Tsunade wants your help, something involving the local kunoichi?

Scene 2: You’ve been transferred to Team 8 and it’s your first time joining their training.

Scene 3: Hinata wants your help with something… personal.

Scene 4: Tsunade has asked you to guide a certain two diplomats.

Scene 5: Sakura and Ino are in a heated argument and need you to answer the age old question: which one is hotter between the two?

Please note in regards to low token count - this is a sort of test bot as most of the information I’m throwing into the Lorebook to see how it handles. Due to the sheer amount of characters (kept simplified for LLM purposes) I left the main bot token count low since it should try to pull various points of information. I’m considering this Beta as this may need changes along the way.

This is more of an AU that only loosely followed past the regular story. Descriptions of characters were bumped to their adult forms with some creative liberty here and there. Dating/marriages backgrounds from the listed characters were not included for this test run.

Currently Implemented:

Hokage Tower (Tsunade and Shizune.)

Team 7 (Kakashi, Naruto, Sakura, Sasuke, Sai.)

Team 8 (Kurenai, Hinata, Kiba, Shino.)

Team 10 (Shikamaru, Ino, Choji.)

Team 3 (Tenten and Rock Lee.)

Icharaku Ramen (Teuchi and Ayame.)

The Academy (Anko and Iruka.)

Inuzuka Clan (Tsume and Hana.)

Hyuuga Clan (Hiashi and Hanabi.)

The Diplomats (Temari and Mei.)

All characters listed are adults in this scenario!

Let me know in the comments if it works well or is bad as I’ve honestly been unable to fully test, but on the base playing it seemed fine enough.

Last side note: if the bot tries to bring a character up and the description is wrong, try rerolling or just adding the character name in your message. Sometimes it pulls character names but doesn't always auto trigger the Lorebook. Shit be beta yo.

Artist Shexyo.
creator: Samuelz
